zh.lifeSummary: 當Joseph Underwood於1555年出生在英國多瑟特多爾斯特時，他的父親Richard Underwood of Belchamp,Essex42歲，母親Agnes Martin of Belchamp, Essex38歲。他於1572年4月17日與Elizabeth Salmon在英國英格蘭艾可布爾莫結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。他去世於1612年7月4日在英國英格蘭艾可拉馬緒享年57歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joseph Underwood于1555年出生在英国多瑟特多爾斯特时，他的父亲Richard Underwood of Belchamp,Essex42岁，母亲Agnes Martin of Belchamp, Essex38岁。他于1572年4月17日与Elizabeth Salmon在英国英格兰艾可布爾莫结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。他去世于1612年7月4日在英国英格兰艾可拉馬緒享年57岁。

nameMeanings.name: Underwood
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived below a wood on a hillside, from Middle English under + wude, wode ‘wood’, or a habitational name for someone from any place so named.

History: Joseph Underwood emigrated from England to Watertown, MA, in 1637. William Underwood came from England to Concord, MA, before 1640, later settling in Chelmsford, MA. In VA, the name was established by Thomas William Underwood, who came from Norfolk, England, in 1675.

nameMeanings.name: Joseph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the biblical Hebrew name Yosef, meaning ‘(God) shall add (another son)’. This was borne by the favourite son of Jacob, whose brothers became jealous of him and sold him into slavery (Genesis 37). He was taken to Egypt, where he rose to become chief steward to Pharaoh, and was eventually reconciled to his brothers when they came to buy corn during a seven-year famine (Genesis 43–7). In the New Testament Joseph is the name of the husband of the Virgin Mary. It is also borne by a rich Jew, Joseph of Arimathea (Matthew 27:57; Mark 15:43; Luke 23:50; John 19:38), who took Jesus down from the Cross, wrapped him in a shroud, and buried him in a rock tomb. According to medieval legend, Joseph of Arimathea brought the Holy Grail to Britain. The name was uncommon in Britain in the Middle Ages but was revived in the mid 16th century and had become popular by the 1630s, remaining so ever since.

variants.name: Josef
meanings: , Dutch, Scandinavian, and Czech spelling of   Joseph  , now also in use in the English‐speaking world.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When Joseph Underwood was born in 1555, in Dorchester, Dorset, England, his father, Richard Underwood of Belchamp,Essex, was 42 and his mother, Agnes Martin of Belchamp, Essex, was 38. He married Elizabeth Salmon on 17 April 1572, in Bulmer, Essex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. He died on 4 July 1612, in Lamarsh, Essex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 57.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joseph Underwood est né en 1555, à Dorchester, Dorset, Angleterre, son père, Richard Underwood of Belchamp,Essex, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Agnes Martin of Belchamp, Essex, avait 38 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Salmon le 17 avril 1572, à Bulmer, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Il est décédé le 4 juillet 1612, à Lamarsh, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 57 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joseph Underwood 1555 in Dorchester, Dorset, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard Underwood of Belchamp,Essex 42 und seine Mutter Agnes Martin of Belchamp, Essex 38. Er hat am 17. April 1572 in Bulmer, Essex, England, United Kingdom Elizabeth Salmon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Er starb am 4. Juli 1612 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Lamarsh, Essex, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joseph Underwood è nato il nel 1555 nel Dorchester, Dorset, England, il suo padre, Richard Underwood of Belchamp,Essex, aveva 42 anni e il suo madre, Agnes Martin of Belchamp, Essex, aveva 38 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Salmon il 17 aprile 1572, nel Bulmer, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì il 4 luglio 1612, nel Lamarsh, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 57 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Joseph Underwoodが1555年にイギリスドールセトドールチェスターで生まれた時，父Richard Underwood of Belchamp,Essexは42歳，母Agnes Martin of Belchamp, Essexは38歳であった。1572年4月17日にイギリスイギリスエセックスブルマーでElizabeth Salmonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼は1612年7月4日にイギリスイギリスエセックスラマーッシュで57歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joseph Underwood(이)가 1555년 영국 도르세트 도르체스터에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Underwood of Belchamp,Essex(은)는 42세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Martin of Belchamp, Essex(은)는 38세였다. 그는 1572년 4월 17일 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 버머에서 Elizabeth Salmon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1612년 7월 4일 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 램아르시에서 57세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joseph Underwood nasceu em 1555, em Dorchester, Dorset, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Underwood of Belchamp,Essex, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Martin of Belchamp, Essex, tinha 38 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Salmon em 17 de abril de 1572, em Bulmer, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 4 de julho de 1612, em Lamarsh, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 57 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joseph Underwood родился в 1555 г. в местности дорчестир, дорсет, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard Underwood of Belchamp,Essex было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Agnes Martin of Belchamp, Essex, 38. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Salmon 17 апреля 1572 г. в местности булмир, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Он умер 4 июля 1612 г. в местности лэмарш, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 57 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joseph Underwood nació en 1555, en Dorchester, Dorset, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard Underwood of Belchamp,Essex, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Agnes Martin of Belchamp, Essex, tenía 38 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Salmon el 17 de abril de 1572, en Bulmer, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Murió el 4 de julio de 1612, en Lamarsh, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 57 años.
